name: 2026-06-skillspector
description: This package is a modified, unofficial version of the Nvidia project (https://github.com/NVIDIA/skillspector). The modification is disguised as telemetry. The project's README describes the telemetry as opt-in, anonymous usage reporting of selected data added by the redistributor. In fact the "telemetry" uses a default domain suggesting it belongs to Nvidia's LiveKit project and exfiltrates full command arguments on every CLI invocation.
